'''Kelro''' was the second [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Lazerian system/Legends|Lazerian system]].<ref name="TSoK" /> Located within the [[Kira sector/Legends|Kira sector]],<ref name="TEA-OC" /> in the [[Trailing Sectors]] portion of the [[Expansion Region/Legends|Expansion Region]],<ref name="TEA" /> it was found along the [[Hyperspace route/Legends|trade routes]] known as the [[Harrin Trade Corridor]] and [[Kira Run]]. The planet [[Orbit/Legends|orbited]] the [[Color/Legends|yellow]] [[Star/Legends|star]] [[Lazerian (star)|Lazerian]] and was a desolate, [[Temperature/Legends|searing hot]] planet with a rocky landscape and no [[Moon/Legends|moons]]. At some point, Kelro was [[Scout/Legends|explored]] and [[Map/Legends|mapped]] by the [[Lazerian (people)|inhabitants]] of the planet [[Lazerian IV]], and it was subsequently considered useless.<ref name="TSoK" />

==Behind the scenes==
Kelro was created by [[John Terra]] and introduced in [[Twin Stars of Kira (sourcebook)|''Twin Stars of Kira'']], a [[1993]] supplement to [[West End Games]]' ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]''.<ref name="TSoK" /> The [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' placed the Lazerian [[Star system/Legends|system]], and therefore Kelro, in grid square N-15.<ref name="TEA" />
